title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
